    D

    dao - package dao
     
    dao.controllers - package dao.controllers
     
    DatabaseTest - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    DatabaseTest() - Constructor for class DatabaseTest
     
    DateLabelFormatter - Class in ui.gui.components.formatters
    DateLabelFormatter is a custom formatter for JFormattedTextField that formats date values in the "yyyy-MM-dd" pattern.
    DateLabelFormatter() - Constructor for class ui.gui.components.formatters.DateLabelFormatter
     
    delete(Auteur) - Method in class dao.controllers.AuteurDAO
    This method deletes an author from the database.
    delete(Genre) - Method in class dao.controllers.GenreDAO
    This method deletes a genre from the database.
    delete(Livre) - Method in class dao.controllers.LivreDAO
    This method deletes a book from the database.
    delete(Pret) - Method in class dao.controllers.PretDAO
    This method deletes a loan from the database.
    delete(Usager) - Method in class dao.controllers.UsagerDAO
     
    DynamicFormPanel - Class in ui.gui.forms
    This class represents a dynamic form panel that allows adding labeled fields dynamically.
    DynamicFormPanel(Insets) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.DynamicFormPanel
    Constructor for the DynamicFormPanel.
